item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 110430Z AUTO 26005KT 9999 -RA FEW006/// BKN013/// OVC090/// ///TCU 12/12 Q1006 TEMPO 4000 -RA BKN003
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 110409Z 1104/1124 20005KT CAVOK TEMPO 1104/1108 4000 -RA BKN006 PROB30 TEMPO 1104/1108 BKN003 BECMG 1107/1109 01007KT BKN012 BECMG 1111/1114 SCT030
